channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-129] quotacheck fails when an OST is permanently deactivated
item.description:
The patch from bugzilla ticket 21174 helped to support sparse OSTs indexes by skipping holes in lov->lov_tgts[i].
However, it is still not sufficient for permanently deactivated OSTs which have lov_tgts[i]->ltd_active = 0 and imp->imp_deactive = 1.
Checking for lov->lov_tgts[i]->ltd_activate should do the trick. A new regression test would also be welcomed.
item.summary: quotacheck fails when an OST is permanently deactivated

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Landed for 1.8.6 and 2.1 so can mark as resolved

Integrated in lustre-master » i686,client,el5,inkernel #40
LU-129 Skip quotacheck on administratively disabled OSTs

Oleg Drokin : 9ab78a5bec154492c70f780706d9eaebeaaa5e54

Niu

Now that you have all the necessary inspections could you please open a bz ticket to push this fix upstream to Oracle? Also, does this fix need landing on master too?

Thanks

Peter
